name: Weddings By Sid
address: Chintamani Nagar, Anand Park, Aundh, Pune, Maharashtra 411067
full_address: Chintamani Nagar, Anand Park, Aundh, Pune, Maharashtra 411067

reviews.text: Our first interaction with Weddings by Sid was at my sister's wedding. We knew then that Sid and his team at WeddingsbySid would be the ones we entrusted to capture the precious moments of my sisters wedding ceremony. They lived up to the promise in every way. The Wedding Photos and Cinematography transport us to our special day letting us experience the love, warmth, and emotion. Grateful for how professional and accommodating they were at the wedding. Thanks for capturing these memories that we will cherish for life. I will highly recommend Weddingsbysid for Wedding and Prewedding Photography in Pune.

I am extremely happy with my pre wedding shoot...sudhir is very flexible with any locations and time.
He gave his 200% to get best of the best out of us..
His jolly nature made me and my husband feel comfortable..
Moreover he gave more time and number of pics and number of edited pics more than our deal...
Extremely grateful for his lovely gesture 😊
Wishing him great luck in photography...
See u soon sudhir for the next shoot 😃

Sudhir and the team are the absolute BEST! I have had the pleasure of working with him twice and would recommend him to anyone. He is so organized, creative, professional, and fun to shoot with! Sudhir and the team captured so many beautiful memories of my family members that I will be able to cherish for the rest of my life. Thank you, thank you, thank you!

I highly recommend him for any of your photography needs!

Marvelous experience. To hire Sid and his team was the best decision we made. From pre-wedding to the end he did an awesome job.

He and his team are so great to work with as you feel so comfortable around them. To feel comfortable around your photographers is really important to get beautiful and memorable pictures. I would any day recommend him to anyone and everyone.🫶🏻❤️

If you want to make your wedding special definitely look forward to book sudhir sawant photos & films.
You won't feel awkward for being infront of camera. You will be no more camera shy. They will guide you  for photography & cinematography effortlessly. And results will be amazing. And you will get best photographs on second day of wedding.
